debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : n > 0
⊢ deriv riemannZeta (-2 * ↑n) ≠ 0

failed_attempts:
by
  intro h
  exact (h (by simpa using hn)).elim

by
  simpa [CriticalStrip] using
    zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple (-2 * (n : ℂ))
      (by
        intro h
        have h0 : (-2 * (n : ℂ)).re ≤ 0 := by
          simpa using (mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (-2 : ℝ) ≤ 0) (by
            have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
            simpa using this))
        exact (not_and_or.mp (not_lt_of_le h0) |>.elim (fun h0lt => h0lt) (fun _ => by
          exact (not_lt_of_ge (show (1 : ℝ) ≤ (-2 * (n : ℂ)).re from le_trans (by linarith) h0) h.2)))
      (by
        simpa using riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat (by exact hn))

by
  have hnot : ¬CriticalStrip (-2 * (n : ℂ)) := by
    intro h
    exact (lt_irrefl (0 : ℝ)) (lt_of_lt_of_le h.1 (by nlinarith))
  exact zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple (-2 * (n : ℂ)) hnot (by
    simpa [riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat] )

    have : ¬ (0 : ℝ) < (-2 : ℝ) := by
      have : (-2 : ℝ) < 0 := by norm_num
      exact not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt this)
